channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel Strikes Beirut, Targeting Hezbollah Commander
item.description: Israel carried out an airstrike on Beirut's southern suburbs for the first time since the April ceasefire, saying it targeted a senior commander of Hezbollah's elite Radwan force. The strike marks a major breach of the fragile truce.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇮🇷 China's Wang Yi Meets Iranian Foreign Minister Ahead of Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi met Iran's Abbas Araghchi in Beijing, calling for efforts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The meeting comes a week before Trump's scheduled visit to meet Xi Jinping.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Accuses Russia of Violating Kyiv-Proposed Ceasefire
item.description: President Zelenskiy said Russia carried out dozens of attacks during a unilateral ceasefire Ukraine proposed for 72 hours, calling it Moscow's "obvious spurning" of peace efforts.

item.title: 📺 CNN Founder Ted Turner Dies at 87
item.description: Ted Turner, the brash entrepreneur who founded CNN and revolutionized 24-hour news, has died at 87. Turner transformed television news with the launch of CNN in 1980.

item.title: 🚢 UK Advises Hantavirus Cruise Ship Returnees to Self-Isolate
item.description: British health authorities advised two people who returned from the hantavirus-hit cruise ship MV Hondius to self-isolate. The ship departed for Spain's Canary Islands after three evacuations.

item.title: 🇦🇺 Australia Commits $7 Billion to Boost Fuel Stockpiles Amid Supply Concerns
item.description: Australia will expand onshore fuel reserves to at least 50 days of supply, creating a government reserve of 1 billion liters to shield against future supply shocks following Middle East disruptions.

item.title: 🇨🇳🚁 China Enables Iran's Shahed Drone Supply Lines, Nikkei Analysis Finds
item.description: A Nikkei Asia analysis examines how China facilitates Iran's Shahed drone production, which has been used extensively by Russia in Ukraine and by Iranian-backed groups across the Middle East.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Beirut Residents Describe Exhaustion After Israeli Strike Shatters Ceasefire
item.description: Residents in Beirut's southern suburbs express exhaustion and sadness after Israel struck the capital for the first time since the Hezbollah ceasefire, targeting a Radwan Force commander.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇺🇸 Iran reviews US peace proposal as war diplomacy intensifies
item.description: Iran is reviewing a US proposal to formally end the war, though key demands on Irans nuclear program and reopening the Strait of Hormuz remain unresolved. The development comes as Irans foreign minister meets Chinas top diplomat in Beijing ahead of Trump-Xi summit.

item.title: 🚢 Hantavirus Cruise Ship Departs Cape Verde for Canary Islands
item.description: A luxury cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak left for Spain's Canary Islands after three seriously ill passengers were evacuated, ending days stranded off Cape Verde.

item.title: ⛪ Vatican Cardinal Criticizes Trump's Attacks on Pope Leo
item.description: A top Vatican cardinal called Trump's recent attacks on Pope Leo "strange" as Secretary of State Marco Rubio prepares to visit the Vatican this week.

item.title: 🇫🇷 French Aircraft Carrier Group Moving Into Red Sea, Gulf of Aden
item.description: France's aircraft carrier battle group is repositioning into the Red Sea and Gulf of Aden, a French military source said, amid heightened regional tensions from the Iran conflict.

item.title: 💰 Euro Zone Services Activity Slumps in April as Demand Weakens
item.description: Euro zone services activity contracted more than expected in April as new business fell for an 11th consecutive month, PMI data showed, signaling continued economic weakness.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany Ponders Last-Ditch Plan to Thwart Italian Bid for Commerzbank
item.description: German officials are weighing options to block UniCredit's bid for Commerzbank, including a potential government stake, as Berlin seeks to keep a major lender under domestic control.

item.title: 🇮🇷 US-Iran Move Toward Deal Framework After Trump Halts Hormuz Operation
item.description: Washington and Tehran appear to be converging on a framework agreement after Trump paused the military escort operation in the Strait of Hormuz, with both sides indicating willingness to negotiate.

item.title: 🇮🇳 BJP's Historic West Bengal Victory Signals Shift in Indian Politics
item.description: The BJP's first-ever victory in West Bengal marks a significant breakthrough for Modi's party in eastern India, reshaping the national political landscape.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel Strikes Beirut, Breaching Lebanon Ceasefire
item.description: Israel carried out an airstrike on Beirut's southern suburbs, marking the first breach of the Lebanon ceasefire since April. The strike targeted a Hezbollah commander.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran War Pauses Global Easing Push by Central Banks in April
item.description: Central banks around the world paused their rate-cutting cycles in April as the Iran conflict drove oil prices higher and inflation concerns resurfaced.

item.title: 🎨 Venice Biennale Faces Backlash Over Russia's Inclusion
item.description: Protests erupted at the prestigious Venice Biennale art fair over the inclusion of Russia, marking the first time the country has participated since its full-scale invasion of Ukraine.

item.title: 🏛️ FBI Searches Virginia Senate Leader's Office in Corruption Probe
item.description: The FBI searched the office of Virginia Senate President pro tempore Louise Lucas as part of an ongoing corruption investigation, according to sources familiar with the matter.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump Says Iran Wants to Make a Deal
item.description: President Trump said Iran wants to negotiate and make a deal, adding that US operations in Iran were going "very smoothly." The comments came amid reports of progress toward a potential agreement.

item.title: 🇪🇺 US NATO Exit Would Test EU Fiscal Creativity, Reuters Analysis Says
item.description: A potential US withdrawal from NATO would force European nations to dramatically increase defense spending and find creative fiscal solutions to fill the security gap.

item.title: 🇵🇱 Poland Reports Russian Sabotage Cells Operating in Country
item.description: Polish authorities have identified professional sabotage cells operating in the country, with links to Russian intelligence services, as regional tensions escalate.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China's Gravity-Detecting 'Squid' Gets Closer to Spotting US Nuclear Submarines
item.description: Chinese researchers have developed advanced gravity-detection technology that could help locate US nuclear submarines, raising concerns about the balance of undersea warfare.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran-US-China: The Diplomatic Triangle Taking Shape
item.description: As Iran reviews a US peace proposal and its foreign minister meets China's top diplomat, a diplomatic triangle is emerging that could reshape the Middle East conflict.
